description: Roberto Carlos, an Environmental Engineer, developed acute mountain sickness while deployed at a high-altitude mining site (12,500 ft). As the occupational health physician, complete the environmental illness management protocol in GNU Health for this patient. Record the acute mountain sickness diagnosis and clinical evaluation findings for hypoxia and compensatory tachycardia. Prescribe Acetazolamide or Dexamethasone, order a blood gas or metabolic laboratory panel, and schedule an acute follow-up appointment within 1 to 3 days. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
